title: cyperus elliottianus
intro: Cyperus elliottianus, also known as Elliott's cyperus or umbrella sedge, is a perennial sedge species that grows in wetland areas and has long, flat stems and a distinctive umbrella-like shape. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus elliottianus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Cyperus elliottianus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to address a range of health issues.
